Index.metaTitle: Custom Jewelry Pouches & Microfiber Drawstring Bags Wholesale | BAMEME Packaging
Index.metaDescription: Factory direct high-end custom jewelry pouches and drawstring bags. 1000 units Low MOQ. Express air cargo 5-7 days worldwide. Online 3D customizer ready.
Index.trustGuaranteeDesc: If your custom pouches arrive with any manufacturing defect or imprint error, we will remake them for free. No questions asked.
Index.trustRevisionsDesc: Our design team creates high-fidelity 3D mockup proofs within 2 hours, offering unlimited edits until you are 100% satisfied.
Index.trustShippingDesc: Mass orders are dispatched via express air cargo (DHL/FedEx) delivering directly to your door in 5-7 days globally with free shipping.
Index.testimonialsSectionTitle: Trusted by 10,000+ Jewelry Brands & Creators Worldwide
Index.testimonial1Text: The low MOQ of 1000 units is a lifesaver for my small artisan jewelry shop. The microfiber bags feel extremely premium, and the gold foil stamp is flawless. Highly recommend!
Index.testimonial2Text: The physical sample pack is incredibly helpful. The logo positions matched perfectly with the final mass production. Delivery to New York via air cargo took only 5 days!
Index.testimonial3Text: Excellent velvet fabric quality, extremely soft and thick. It provides crucial scratch and shock protection for our premium perfume glass packaging. Outstanding service!
Index.trustPartnersTitle: Secure Payments & Global Express Logistics Partners
Index.faq1Question: What is the Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)?
Index.faq1Answer: Our high-end microfiber and velvet drawstring bags start with a very low MOQ of 1000 units. It is highly friendly to Etsy creators, Shopify sellers, and boutique jewelry brands.
Index.faq2Question: Can I request a physical sample pack for free?
Index.faq2Answer: Yes. We offer a $0 physical sample pack containing multiple pouch sizes and print technique swatches (foil printing, debossing). You only need to pay $9.99 for global express courier postage to inspect texture and print quality first-hand.
Index.faq3Question: How long will production and shipping take?
Index.faq3Answer: Once you confirm the 3D design proof, the production takes 7-10 business days. Finished goods are dispatched via express air cargo (DHL/FedEx) delivering directly to your door in 5-7 days globally with free shipping.
Index.faq4Question: How does the online 3D customizer work? Is it automated?
Index.faq4Answer: Yes, it is fully automated. The logo coordinates, process, and sizing details you lock on our canvas generate structural metadata that binds directly to Stripe checkout. Once paid, the order pushes to our factory workflow instantly with zero manual errors.
Index.faq5Question: What is the scratch-protection difference between velvet and microfiber jewelry pouches?
Index.faq5Answer: Microfiber fabric offers an ultra-smooth, silk-like feel and features natural micro-dust cleaning and polishing properties, making it optimal for silver jewelry, pearls, and high-shine metals. Classic plush velvet is thicker and provides superior shock absorption, making it better for gold bangles, luxury smartwatches, and premium corporate gifts.
Index.faq6Question: Can I get a free 3D digital mockup if I don't have a finished vector logo?
Index.faq6Answer: Absolutely. Our professional packaging designers operate 24/7. Even if you only upload a standard JPG image, hand-drawn sketch, or simply type your brand name, our design team will reconstruct it and deliver a high-fidelity 3D mockup within 2 hours for free.
Index.title: Elevate Your Brand with Custom Premium Jewelry Pouches & Drawstring Bags
Index.subtitle: Direct factory source. Low MOQ 1000 pcs. Free global air shipping. 3-day express mockup. Perfect for Jewelry, Cosmetics, Gifts & Tech.
Index.feature1Desc: Super soft texture that protects delicate jewelry and accessories from scratches and naturally polishes them.
Index.feature2Desc: Extremely friendly for Etsy sellers, startup brands, gift suppliers, and boutique stores.
Index.feature3Desc: Fast 5-7 days air cargo to your door. Skip the long sea shipping and customs hassle.
Index.step1Desc: Upload your design file. Our smart canvas automatically filters out white backgrounds.
Index.step2Desc: Adjust size, drag to position, and toggle gold foil, silver foil, or debossing effects.
Index.step3Desc: Order a physical sample pack ($0 sample, just pay $9.99 postage) to verify quality.
Index.step4Desc: Confirm proof, start mass production, and receive your packaging via air cargo.

Index.productsSubtitle: Direct factory supply with low MOQ. Order free mockup or request physical samples to check quality.
Index.product1Desc: Ultra-soft microfiber fabric with delicate touch. Perfect protection for premium rings, necklaces, and delicate accessories.
Index.product2Desc: Premium heavy-weight velvet with royal elegance. Excellent choice for luxury watches, gold bracelets, and VIP gifts.
Index.product3Desc: 250g heavy cardstock bag with silk satin ribbon handles. Top choice for boutiques, high-end cosmetics, and retail branding.
Index.product4Desc: 100% biodegradable organic kraft paper with durable twisted handles. Minimalist organic vibe for retail and daily packaging.
Index.product5Desc: Heavy-weight organic cotton canvas. Sturdy, breathable, and highly reusable. Best for tech gadgets and cosmetic storage.
Index.product6Desc: Premium textured specialty paper with strong magnetic closure. Extra rigid protection for corporate VIP gifts and watch sets.
